race.comment: WOLF GAP (2) good debut winner two-back at Warwick Farm, then thrown in the deep end with a gritty third in the G2 Todman over 1200m at Randwick. Look for him to close strongly from back in the field as he gets out to his right trip. HARDANGER (11) comes here in peak condition and like the way she closed late to run fifth over 1200m in the G3 Magic Night Stakes at this track. Berry sticks from the good gate and expected to go close. PERSIAN WONDER (4) talented gelding who indicated from day one that he will improve as he gets out in trip. Returned a solid set of closing splits from last on the turn when fourth in the G3 Pago Pago over 1200m here. Expect J Mac to have him a little closer in the run. Leading player. PLAGIARISM (1) tough colt yet to draw a decent gate in all three starts and today is no different. Knocked up late with a narrow fifth over 1200m in the G2 Skyline at Randwick. Fitter now but looks under the odds. HIGH ALERT (7) going well enough to take a hand in the finish.
